adhil udhayam oru paadal

isaiai malaraai naalum soottuven

Idhayam oru kovil

aathma raagam ondrilthaan

naatham thazham aanadhe

uyiril kalandhu paadumpodhu
edhuvum paadale

edhuvum pudhithillai

raagangal koadi koadi
adhum pudhithillai

endurm pudhidhu

idhil vazhum dhevi nee
isaiai malaraai naalum soottuven

Kaamam thaedum ulagile
geetham ennum deepathaal
raama naam meedhile
naatha thiyaaga rajarum
oonai urukki uyiril vilakkai
yaetrinaar ammaa

aval paadalil jeevan

Idhayam oru kovil
adhil udhayam oru paadal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Idhayam Oru Kovil'?

The song conveys themes of love and devotion, expressing the emotions associated with a romantic relationship.

In which movie is 'Idhayam Oru Kovil' featured?

'Idhayam Oru Kovil' is featured in the movie Idhaya Kovil.

Who is the singer of 'Idhayam Oru Kovil'?

The song is sung by Ilaiyaraaja, who is also the music director.

When was 'Idhayam Oru Kovil' released?

The song was released on September 14, 1985.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Idhaya Kovil, 'Idhayam Oru Kovil' serves as a poignant expression of love, encapsulating the feelings of longing and devotion. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an emotional atmosphere that resonates with the audience. It beautifully conveys the essence of romance, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema. The combination of Ilaiyaraaja's music and the lyrical depth elevates the song, leaving a lasting impact on listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhayam Oru Kovil is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Idhaya Kovil as its backdrop, this song showcases the enchanting musical style of Ilaiyaraaja, making it a cherished classic in Tamil cinema. Its soothing lyrics and heartfelt composition resonate deeply with listeners, evoking a sense of nostalgia and romance.
stanzaMeanings: The heart is a temple, and in it, there is a song.
The heart is a temple, and in it, there is a song. The goddess living here, you are the musical flower, I will always surround you like a musical flower.
The heart is a temple, and in it, there is a song.
The soul's melody is what makes life dance, and life is the essence of living, the sound of life is not to be lost.
When souls unite to sing, nothing else matters, songs are countless, nothing is new.
Melodies are countless, and they are not new. My life is you, and it is always new.
The heart is a temple, and in it, there is a song. The goddess living here, you are the musical flower, I will always surround you like a musical flower.
The heart is a temple, and in it, there is a song.
In this world where desire seeks, the song is like a lamp, and the name of Rama is the light that guides. The king of sacrifice has melted you, and they have lit the lamp of life.
In her song, life is there, and he is the one. In my song, life is there, and that is you.
You and I are one, where is the separation?
The heart is a temple, and in it, there is a song.
You and I will go together, the time of love has come, and it will not pass away.
When the path is one, the directions are different. My path is different, your path is different.
The one who is the protector is my life, and he is my lord.
Live always with prosperity and always thrive.
